name: ai_trends
description: Check current trends in AI using Google Trends, summarize the findings, and write them to a dated results file find_<today>.txt. Unattended; never asks the user anything.

variables.description: The raw trending AI topics and rising search terms collected from Google Trends.
The concise human-readable summary of the AI trends, written to the dated results file.

settings.action: Query Google Trends for trending/rising AI topics. Set `trends_findings` to top trending AI queries, their relative interest, and notable rising terms.
From `trends_findings`, set `trends_report`: list top trending AI topics, mark each rising vs. stable, add one-line takeaway on overall AI interest direction.
Write `trends_report` to `find_<today>.txt` in cwd (<today>=YYYY-MM-DD, e.g. find_2026-06-22.txt). Unattended; ask nothing.
